goals.description: Complete the remaining 2.8% of the scholarship essay and upload final files to hit 100% before the deadline.
goals.rationale: I'm at 97% with a soft deadline in three days, but my impulsive nature makes me feel like I need to 'lock it in' now to avoid future anxiety. Rejection is a failure that looks incompetent to my cohort; I can't afford the emotional whiplash of waiting or the risk of losing momentum. The sunk cost of the last hour demands closure tonight. Once this loop is closed, I'll renegotiate my recovery session immediately without guilt.
